source.body_text_sample:
Company Website
Intrahealth Careers Site

We're looking for great people to join our growing team!

View Openings

Intrahealth delivers enterprise-grade healthcare management software solutions created by medical doctors and purpose-built for complex healthcare settings. We pride ourself on working closely with our customers on implementation and beyond to ensure successful adoption and improved patient outcomes.

Our solution is highly configurable, scalable, secure, and interoperable and offers a robust solution that improves visibility on patient success rates, simplifies reporting, and enables collaboration between jurisdictions, programs, and practitioners within an organized and easy-to-use interface.

Our Openings
Sorry, we don't currently have any open positions.
